allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.bug_tracker import get_bug_tracker; print(''Bug tracker import successful'')")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.config import load_config; cfg = load_config(); print(''Config loaded for env:'', cfg[''runtime''][''env''])")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.bug_tracker import get_bug_tracker; bt = get_bug_tracker(); print(''Bug tracker tests passed'')")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.bug_tracker import get_bug_tracker; bt = get_bug_tracker(); bugs = bt.get_bugs_by_criteria({''status'': ''open''}); print(f''Open bugs: {len(bugs)}''); [print(f''- {bug[""bug_id""]}: {bug[""title""]}'') for bug in bugs]")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.build_validator import get_build_validator; bv = get_build_validator(); info = bv.get_build_info(''dev''); print(f''Current dev build: {info[""build_id""]}'')")
